|facebook=GujaratTitansIPL |youtube=@gujarattitans |twitter=gujarat_titans |instagram=gujarat_titans |discord= |previous= }} '''''[https://www.gujarattitansipl.com/ Gujarat Titans]''''' in collaboration with '''''[[Revenant Esports]]''''' present the first season of '''Titans Rising''' with a prize pool of ₹22,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{BroadcasterCard |position=Commentators |b1=Saltyy |b2=SardarjiYT |b3=NekRoz }} ===Format=== * '''Titans Rising:''''' October 10th - 27th, 2024 ** 2048 teams ** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}} * '''Oepn Qualifiers:''''' October 10th - 15th, 2024 ** 2048 teams, 6 matchdays. ** {{bgcolortext|up|32 teams}} qualify for ''Pre Quarters. * '''Pre Quarters:''''' October 16th - 17th, 2024 ** 64 teams, 2 matchdays. ***32 teams from Open Qualifiers. ***32 teams Invited. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 48 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Quarter Finals. * '''Quarter Finals:''''' October 18th - 20th, 2024 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 16 teams each. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} from the each group qualify for ''Semi Finals. * '''Semi Finals:''''' October 21st - 23rd, 2024 ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Each team plays a total of 12 matches. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Grand Finals. * '''Grand Finals:''''' October 24th - 27th, 2024 ** 16 teams, 4 matchdays. ** 24 matches (6 each day). ===Points System=== {{PUBGM 2023 Points System}} ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool
